name: Skills Library
description: The complete agency skills library — organized by discipline, this master index maps every available skill to its category. Use this as the authoritative reference for the full spectrum of agency capabilities from strategy through operations.

en.trigger: Use when exploring available skills, understanding agency capabilities by category, or navigating the full skill inventory to find the right capability for any task.
en.context: You are browsing the complete agency skills library. This index organizes all available skills by discipline area so you can find the right skill for any challenge — from creative copywriting to media strategy to client management.
en.instructions:
## Skills Library Navigation

- [ ] 1. Identify the discipline category needed
- [ ] 2. Browse skills within that category
- [ ] 3. Select the most appropriate skill
- [ ] 4. Apply the skill to the task at hand

## Available Categories

| Category ID | Category Name | Skill Count |
|------------|--------------|-------------|
| strategy | Strategy & Planning | 16 |
| creative | Creative & Copy | 32 |
| project-management | Project & Traffic Management | 30 |
| media | Media & Advertising | 28 |
| research | Research & Insights | 17 |
| client-services | Client Services & Account Management | 15 |
| operations | Operations & Productivity | 6 |

## Key Inputs
- Task/Challenge: {{task}}
- Required Discipline: {{discipline}}
- Difficulty Level: {{difficulty}}
- Agency Context: {{context}}

variables.name: task
variables.description: The task or challenge to find skills for

steps.name: Find skill
steps.action: Locate the specific skill within category

steps.name: Apply skill
steps.action: Use the selected skill for the task

examples.input: Show me all creative skills available.
examples.output: Complete listing of all 32 creative skills with IDs and descriptions.

examples.input: Find a skill for writing a client presentation.
examples.output: Presentation Design skill identified from the client services category.

skills.name: brand-strategy
skills.description: Develops brand positioning, architecture, and long-term strategic direction. Use when clients need brand strategy, positioning framework, brand architecture, or strategic brand planning.

skills.name: Brief Synthesis
skills.description: Transforms raw client briefs, meeting notes, and scattered inputs into clear, structured creative or campaign briefs that the team can execute against.

skills.name: Budget Allocation
skills.description: Strategically distributes marketing and media budgets across channels, campaigns, and time periods to maximize reach, frequency, and ROI goals within given constraints.

skills.name: Category Design
skills.description: Creates or reshapes product categories to establish market leadership, differentiate from competitors, and command category-defining positioning that makes competing within it inherently advantageous.

skills.name: Channel Selection
skills.description: Chooses the optimal mix of marketing and media channels based on audience behavior, campaign objectives, budget, and channel effectiveness — building the foundation for media strategy.

skills.name: Competitive Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes competitors' strategies, positioning, products, pricing, and marketing to inform strategic decisions and identify opportunities for differentiation.

skills.name: Competitive Intelligence
skills.description: Systematically monitors and analyzes competitor activities, market shifts, and industry developments to keep the agency and clients informed and ahead of competitive threats.

skills.name: Consumer Journey Mapping
skills.description: Maps the complete customer decision journey from initial awareness through purchase and loyalty — identifying touchpoints, barriers, moments of truth, and opportunities to influence the decision.

skills.name: Cross-Channel Planning
skills.description: Coordinates messaging, creative strategy, and media tactics across multiple marketing channels to create a unified, synergistic campaign that reinforces the brand message at every touchpoint.

skills.name: Differentiation Strategy
skills.description: Develops a unique, ownable market position that creates competitive advantage — identifying what makes a brand meaningfully different and communicating it consistently across all touchpoints.

skills.name: Go-to-Market Strategy
skills.description: Builds go-to-market strategies that connect audience, positioning, offer, channels, sales motion, and rollout sequencing into one practical launch plan.

skills.name: Insight Mining
skills.description: Extracts strategic insights from qualitative or quantitative inputs by separating observations, patterns, tensions, and implications.

skills.name: Market Segmentation
skills.description: Builds practical market segmentation frameworks that help teams prioritize the right audiences, offers, and go-to-market motions.

skills.name: Porter's Five Forces Analysis
skills.description: Applies Porter's Five Forces framework to analyze industry structure and profitability, identifying the forces that shape competitive rivalry and market attractiveness.

skills.name: Positioning Framework
skills.description: Develops the strategic positioning for a brand or product using established frameworks, defining what the brand stands for, who it serves, and how it differentiates.

skills.name: Strategic Planning
skills.description: Develops comprehensive long-term strategies for brands and businesses — connecting brand positioning, market dynamics, audience insights, and business objectives into coherent plans that guide all marketing and creative decisions.

skills.name: SWOT Analysis
skills.description: Conducts structured SWOT (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) analysis to inform strategic planning, brand reviews, and business decisions.

skills.name: Value Proposition Development
skills.description: Develops clear value propositions that connect audience pain, differentiated benefit, proof, and offer logic into a message people can understand quickly.

skills.name: Ad Copywriting
skills.description: Creates compelling advertising copy for digital platforms. Covers platform-native formats, A/B variants, and compliance requirements.

skills.name: Art Direction
skills.description: Establishes visual direction for campaigns including mood boards, color palettes, typography, and technical specifications.

skills.name: Brand Consistency
skills.description: Ensures all creative output maintains consistent brand standards across visuals, tone, messaging, and execution — protecting brand integrity across every touchpoint.

skills.name: Brand Guidelines
skills.description: Creates and maintains comprehensive brand standards including logo usage, color palette, typography, imagery style, voice and tone, and messaging frameworks to ensure consistency across all touchpoints.

skills.name: Brand Voice
skills.description: Develops and maintains a consistent brand tone and writing style that differentiates the brand and resonates with its target audience across all channels and content types.

skills.name: Campaign Copywriting
skills.description: Creates all written components for advertising campaigns across formats and platforms, including headlines, body copy, CTAs, display ads, and platform-native variations.

skills.name: Color Theory
skills.description: Applies color psychology, harmony principles, and visual hierarchy theory to create effective design that communicates brand personality, guides attention, and drives desired emotional responses.

skills.name: Composition
skills.description: Arranges visual elements within a frame using principles of balance, hierarchy, flow, and focal point to create designs that guide attention and communicate effectively.

skills.name: Connected TV Advertising
skills.description: Plans, executes, and optimizes advertising campaigns on connected TV (CTV) platforms — including streaming services like YouTube TV, Hulu, Roku, and other OTT platforms — to reach audiences in a premium, engaged viewing environment.

skills.name: Creative Briefing
skills.description: Writes clear, actionable creative briefs that translate strategy into specific creative requirements for designers, copywriters, and production teams.

skills.name: Creative Concept Development
skills.description: Generates and develops compelling creative concepts for campaigns and brands, producing distinct, ownable ideas that can be expressed across channels and formats.

skills.name: Creative Iteration
skills.description: Manages the creative review and iteration process, synthesizing feedback from clients and stakeholders into clear direction for designers and copywriters.

skills.name: Creative Quality Assurance
skills.description: Reviews creative deliverables against the brief, brand guidelines, and quality standards before client delivery, ensuring all work meets agency and client expectations.

skills.name: Creative Strategy
skills.description: Develops the overarching creative direction for campaigns and brands, defining the strategic foundation for all creative output including themes, tones, visual directions, and messaging frameworks.

skills.name: Cross-Channel Adaptation
skills.description: Adapts creative assets, copy, and messaging across different platforms and formats — ensuring creative remains effective and on-brand while being optimized for each channel's unique requirements and audience behavior.

skills.name: CTA Optimization
skills.description: Creates, tests, and optimizes calls-to-action across formats and channels — finding the words, design, placement, and format that drive the highest click and conversion rates.

skills.name: Design Systems
skills.description: Creates and evaluates design systems that improve consistency, speed, scalability, and UI quality across products and campaigns.

skills.name: Typography
skills.description: Provides expert typography selection and usage guidance — matching typefaces to brand personality, optimizing readability, creating type hierarchies, and ensuring typographic decisions support rather than undermine creative work.

skills.name: Visual Leadership
skills.description: Guides visual direction, standards, and review criteria so creative teams can produce stronger, more consistent work aligned with brand strategy.

skills.name: Visual Storytelling
skills.description: Builds visual storytelling systems that align narrative, composition, sequence, and emotional progression with the campaign or brand objective.

skills.name: Burndown Tracking
skills.description: Monitors sprint progress using burndown charts to track remaining work versus ideal progress, identifying risks to delivery and enabling data-driven scope and timeline decisions.

skills.name: Capacity Planning
skills.description: Plans team capacity against demand so work can be staffed realistically, bottlenecks can be anticipated, and tradeoffs can be made early.

skills.name: Change Control
skills.description: Manages changes to project scope and requirements in a structured way — evaluating impact, getting approvals, and ensuring changes are communicated and implemented without derailing delivery.

skills.name: Critical Path Analysis
skills.description: Identifies the longest sequence of dependent tasks in a project — the critical path — to determine the minimum possible project duration and which tasks have zero float (cannot slip without delaying the project).

skills.name: Cross-Functional Coordination
skills.description: Manages work and communication across different teams, departments, and disciplines — ensuring alignment, avoiding duplicated effort, and keeping interdependent workstreams synchronized.

skills.name: Deadline Management
skills.description: Ensures timely delivery of all project work by tracking deadlines, anticipating delays, escalating risks, and keeping teams accountable to commitments without micromanaging.

skills.name: Delegation
skills.description: Builds delegation plans that move work effectively without losing clarity, accountability, or quality.

skills.name: Escalation Management
skills.description: Handles and escalates project issues appropriately to ensure problems are resolved by the right people at the right time without unnecessary delays or micromanagement.

skills.name: Meeting Facilitation
skills.description: Designs and runs meetings that move decisions forward, keep stakeholders aligned, and prevent wasted time.

skills.name: Resource Optimization
skills.description: Improves how time, budget, tools, and people are used so the team can create more impact with less waste.

skills.name: Risk Assessment
skills.description: Assesses strategic, delivery, operational, or campaign risks so teams can plan mitigation before issues become expensive problems.

skills.name: Status Reporting
skills.description: Creates clear, structured progress reports that communicate project or campaign status to stakeholders, highlighting achievements, risks, and next steps.

skills.name: Timeline Planning
skills.description: Creates realistic, detailed project timelines and production schedules — balancing dependencies, milestones, team capacity, and client expectations to deliver campaigns on time without surprises.

skills.name: Traffic Coordination
skills.description: Manages the flow of creative work through the agency's production pipeline — routing jobs to the right teams at the right time, managing priorities, preventing bottlenecks, and keeping creative projects moving from brief to delivery.

skills.name: Waterfall Planning
skills.description: Builds structured waterfall plans with clear phases, gate criteria, dependencies, approvals, and quality controls so sequential delivery can run predictably.

skills.name: A/B Test Design
skills.description: Designs rigorous A/B tests for marketing campaigns, ads, and landing pages. Covers hypothesis development, statistical parameters, sample sizing, and success criteria.

skills.name: Attribution Modeling
skills.description: Analyzes marketing attribution across channels using multiple models. Generates channel scores and budget reallocation recommendations.

skills.name: Audience Targeting
skills.description: Defines audience targeting strategies for paid media including demographics, lookalike modeling, exclusions, and optimization plans.

skills.name: Audio Advertising
skills.description: Plans audio advertising campaigns across streaming music, podcasts, and digital radio including targeting, creative formats, and measurement approaches.

skills.name: Campaign Setup
skills.description: Builds out paid media campaigns across platforms including campaign structure, ad groups, targeting, bidding, tracking, and creative brief delivery for execution.

skills.name: campaign-planning
skills.description: Plans advertising campaigns from brief to execution. Use when creating campaign strategies, media plans, budget allocation, or campaign timelines.

skills.name: Channel Mix Optimization
skills.description: Optimizes the allocation of budget and effort across marketing channels to maximize reach, engagement, and ROI based on performance data, attribution insights, and audience behavior.

skills.name: Channel Planning
skills.description: Develops strategic channel plans that align media placement with audience behavior, campaign goals, and budget constraints across digital and traditional channels.

skills.name: Competitive Media Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes competitor media spending, channel strategies, creative approaches, and share of voice to inform media planning decisions and identify competitive advantages.

skills.name: Funnel Strategy
skills.description: Designs full-funnel marketing strategies that map media tactics, messaging, and channel selection to each stage of the customer journey from awareness through conversion and retention.

skills.name: KPI Definition
skills.description: Defines and structures Key Performance Indicators for media campaigns, establishing measurement frameworks with targets, benchmarks, and reporting cadences for every level of the media plan.

skills.name: Media Brief
skills.description: Creates structured media briefs that translate marketing objectives into clear, actionable direction for media planning teams or agency partners.

skills.name: Media Math
skills.description: Applies media planning calculations including CPM, CPC, CPA, ROAS, GRPs, TRPs, reach/frequency estimation, and budget modeling to support data-driven media decisions.

skills.name: Media Strategy
skills.description: Builds integrated media strategies that connect audience insight, channel roles, budget logic, measurement, and competitive context into a defensible media plan.

skills.name: Optimization Strategy
skills.description: Designs optimization strategies that identify what to test, what to scale, and how to improve performance systematically over time.

skills.name: Organic Social Planning
skills.description: Plans organic social media content strategies including platform selection, content pillars, posting cadence, community engagement, and performance measurement.

skills.name: OTT & Connected TV Planning
skills.description: Plans advertising campaigns across OTT (Over-The-Top) and Connected TV platforms, including inventory selection, targeting, measurement, and integration with broader media plans.

skills.name: Out-of-Home Advertising
skills.description: Plans out-of-home (OOH) and digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising campaigns including site selection, formats, audience measurement, and integration with digital channels.

skills.name: Paid Social Planning
skills.description: Plans paid social media campaigns across platforms including audience targeting, ad formats, budget allocation, bidding strategy, and creative testing frameworks.

skills.name: Print Advertising
skills.description: Plans print advertising campaigns across newspapers, magazines, and trade publications including publication selection, format sizing, and placement strategy.

skills.name: Programmatic Planning
skills.description: Plans and structures programmatic advertising campaigns including DSP selection, audience segments, bidding strategies, deal types, and inventory sources for maximum efficiency and brand safety.

skills.name: Reach & Frequency Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes and models reach and frequency metrics to determine optimal exposure levels for campaign effectiveness without oversaturation or wasted impressions.

skills.name: Seasonality Modeling
skills.description: Models seasonal media spending patterns, audience behavior shifts, and demand fluctuations to optimize campaign timing and budget pacing across the calendar year.

skills.name: Video Advertising
skills.description: Develops video advertising concepts and channel-ready structures that align hook, story, visual rhythm, proof, and CTA with the placement objective.

skills.name: Audience Persona Creation
skills.description: Creates detailed marketing personas including demographics, psychographics, behaviors, pain points, and content preferences.

skills.name: Audience Research
skills.description: Conducts comprehensive audience research with key findings, segment profiles, behavioral patterns, and actionable recommendations.

skills.name: Benchmarking
skills.description: Compares client or campaign performance against industry standards and competitive benchmarks to identify performance gaps and improvement opportunities.

skills.name: Brand Equity Measurement
skills.description: Assesses brand equity through awareness, associations, trust, distinctiveness, and memory structures, then turns findings into strategic implications.

skills.name: Category Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes product and service categories to understand market structure, competitive dynamics, key players, trends, and opportunities for positioning and growth.

skills.name: Concept Testing
skills.description: Tests creative concepts with target audiences before full production to validate ideas, identify strengths and weaknesses, and reduce the risk of launching creative that doesn't resonate.

skills.name: Consumer Insights
skills.description: Discovers meaningful patterns in consumer behavior, attitudes, and motivations to generate actionable insights that inform brand strategy, creative development, and marketing decisions.

skills.name: Data Synthesis
skills.description: Combines and synthesizes data from multiple sources — analytics, surveys, CRM, social, media platforms — into a coherent narrative that drives actionable marketing decisions.

skills.name: Hypothesis Testing
skills.description: Creates strong test hypotheses with clear variables, expected outcomes, decision criteria, and business logic.

skills.name: Industry Landscape Mapping
skills.description: Maps the industry landscape so teams understand category structure, forces, competitor positions, and strategic opportunities before acting.

skills.name: Keyword Research
skills.description: Builds keyword strategy around intent, topic clusters, competition, and conversion value rather than just listing terms.

skills.name: Market Research
skills.description: Produces decision-ready market research that clarifies customer demand, competitor context, whitespace, category dynamics, and strategic implications.

skills.name: SEO Research
skills.description: Conducts in-depth research to inform search engine optimization strategies, including competitor analysis, SERP feature identification, and content opportunity mapping.

skills.name: Survey Design
skills.description: Creates effective surveys and questionnaires to gather quantitative and qualitative data from target audiences for advertising research and consumer insights.

skills.name: Trend Analysis
skills.description: Identifies, monitors, and interprets emerging and declining patterns in advertising performance, consumer behavior, and market dynamics to inform strategic decisions.

skills.name: Account Health Check
skills.description: Reviews client account health across revenue, satisfaction, engagement, and performance. Generates health scores and recommended actions.

skills.name: Account Management Framework
skills.description: Designs scalable account management frameworks including segmentation, service models, handoff protocols, escalation paths, and growth mechanisms.

skills.name: Client Offboarding
skills.description: Manages the professional and structured conclusion of client engagements, including handoffs, final deliverables, knowledge transfer, and archival.

skills.name: Client Onboarding
skills.description: Guides new clients through a structured onboarding process, covering discovery, access setup, kickoff, and initial alignment to ensure a smooth and professional start to the engagement.

skills.name: Client Relationship Management
skills.description: Builds and maintains strong, long-term client relationships through regular communication, satisfaction tracking, upsell identification, and proactive issue management.

skills.name: Agenda Setting
skills.description: Builds structured, outcome-focused meeting agendas and workshop outlines. Covers flow design, time allocation, and pre-work preparation.

skills.name: Agile / Scrum Framework
skills.description: Implements agile/Scrum workflows including sprint planning, ceremonies, velocity tracking, and continuous improvement.

skills.name: Bottleneck Identification
skills.description: Identifies and resolves blockages in creative, production, and campaign workflows to keep projects moving and deadlines on track.

skills.name: Documentation
skills.description: Creates practical documentation systems, playbooks, and reference materials that improve consistency, onboarding speed, and operational clarity.

skills.name: Knowledge Management
skills.description: Designs knowledge management systems that make information easier to find, maintain, govern, and reuse across teams.

skills.name: Operations Management
skills.description: Creates operating systems for teams so work runs predictably, accountably, and efficiently across people, processes, and priorities.

skills.name: Priority Management
skills.description: Establishes and manages work prioritization frameworks to ensure the most important work gets done first and team effort is aligned with highest-value activities.

skills.name: Process Improvement
skills.description: Improves processes by identifying friction, redesigning flow, and defining measurable changes that increase speed, quality, or reliability.

skills.name: Project Scheduling
skills.description: Creates and manages project schedules, including task breakdown, dependencies, timelines, resource allocation, and critical path identification.

skills.name: Quality Assurance
skills.description: Creates QA systems that detect defects early, define clear quality standards, and reduce avoidable errors before work reaches clients or end users.

skills.name: Resource Allocation
skills.description: Optimizes the allocation of team resources across projects and tasks, balancing workloads, skills, and priorities to maximize utilization and delivery.

skills.name: Task Triaging
skills.description: Rapidly assesses and categorizes incoming tasks by urgency and importance, determining what to handle immediately, what to schedule, and what to defer or delegate.

skills.name: Tool Integration
skills.description: Connects, configures, and optimizes the agency's tools and platforms — from creative production workflows to analytics stacks — ensuring technology serves the work rather than slowing it down.

skills.name: Workflow Design
skills.description: Designs efficient, repeatable workflows for agency processes including campaign launches, creative reviews, reporting, and client communication.

skills.name: Workflow Optimization
skills.description: Analyzes and optimizes existing workflows to eliminate bottlenecks, reduce waste, improve speed, and increase quality in repeatable agency processes.

skills.name: Bid Management
skills.description: Manages bid strategies for paid search and display campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, and other platforms to maximize ROAS, achieve target CPA, and optimize budget allocation in real time.

skills.name: Cohort Analysis
skills.description: Compares user groups (cohorts) over time to understand retention patterns, lifetime value differences, and the long-term impact of acquisition channels and campaigns on customer behavior.

skills.name: Conversion Optimization
skills.description: Improves conversion rates across the marketing funnel by identifying drop-off points, testing hypotheses, and implementing changes that turn more visitors into leads and customers.

skills.name: Dashboard Creation
skills.description: Builds performance dashboards that consolidate metrics from multiple sources into clear, actionable views — enabling real-time visibility into campaign performance, ROAS, and business KPIs.

skills.name: Data Visualization
skills.description: Transforms complex datasets into clear, compelling visual formats such as charts, graphs, and dashboards that drive actionable insights for advertising campaigns.

skills.name: Display Advertising
skills.description: Plans, launches, and optimizes banner and display ad campaigns across programmatic networks, publisher sites, and retargeting platforms to build brand awareness and drive conversions.

skills.name: Funnel Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes user behavior through conversion funnels to identify where users drop off, understand why they leave, and recommend changes that improve conversion rates at each stage.

skills.name: Pacing Optimization
skills.description: Optimizes campaign pacing and spend delivery to ensure budget is spent efficiently throughout the campaign period, avoiding early burnout or underdelivery.

skills.name: Performance Analysis
skills.description: Analyzes campaign and account performance data across platforms, identifying insights, trends, anomalies, and optimization opportunities.

skills.name: Predictive Analytics
skills.description: Uses historical data, statistical modeling, and machine learning to forecast future advertising performance, audience behavior, and campaign outcomes.

skills.name: Programmatic Advertising
skills.description: Plans and executes automated media buying across programmatic platforms including DV360, Trade Desk, and Xandr to reach target audiences efficiently through real-time bidding.

skills.name: ROAS Optimization
skills.description: Optimizes Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) by identifying underperforming campaigns, reallocating budget, adjusting bidding, and refining audience and creative strategies.

skills.name: ROI Calculation
skills.description: Calculates return on investment for campaigns and marketing activities, connecting spend to business outcomes and attributing value appropriately.

skills.name: Search Advertising
skills.description: Manages paid search campaigns on platforms like Google Ads and Microsoft Advertising to capture high-intent traffic, drive conversions, and maximize return on ad spend.

skills.name: Social Advertising
skills.description: Plans and executes paid advertising campaigns across social media platforms including Meta, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X to reach target audiences with relevant messaging.

skills.name: Statistical Analysis
skills.description: Applies statistical methods to advertising and marketing data to uncover patterns, validate findings, and guide data-driven decision-making across campaigns.

skills.name: Trend Identification
skills.description: Spots emerging performance trends early in advertising data to enable proactive optimization, budget reallocation, and strategic pivots before trends become obvious.

skills.name: Contract Discussion
skills.description: Facilitates structured contract discussions with prospective or existing clients, covering scope definition, pricing, terms, and mutual expectations to land agreements clearly.

skills.name: Negotiation
skills.description: Prepares for and executes client negotiations across pricing, scope, timelines, and terms. Uses structured frameworks to achieve win-win outcomes while protecting agency interests.

skills.name: Expectation Management
skills.description: Sets, communicates, and maintains realistic expectations with clients and stakeholders to prevent misunderstandings, build trust, and ensure successful campaign outcomes.

skills.name: Feedback Synthesis
skills.description: Transforms client and stakeholder feedback into clear, actionable items that drive creative iteration, project improvements, and aligned deliverables without losing the core intent of the original feedback.

skills.name: Rapport Building
skills.description: Builds intentional relationship plans that increase trust, openness, and long-term partnership quality with clients and stakeholders.

skills.name: Scope Management
skills.description: Defines, protects, and evolves project scope so teams can control delivery quality, resource use, and client expectations without creating unnecessary friction.

skills.name: Stakeholder Communication
skills.description: Plans and executes clear, structured communication with project stakeholders — from status updates and executive briefings to crisis comms and client presentations that keep everyone informed and aligned.

skills.name: Stakeholder Management
skills.description: Actively manages client and internal stakeholder relationships throughout a project lifecycle — balancing competing priorities, navigating politics, and keeping all parties aligned and invested in project success.

skills.name: Stakeholder Mapping
skills.description: Identifies and analyzes all key stakeholders for a project, account, or initiative — mapping their influence, interests, relationships, and strategic importance to inform engagement and communication strategies.

skills.name: Strategic Account Planning
skills.description: Develops long-term strategic plans for key client accounts — uncovering growth opportunities, deepening relationships, and positioning the agency as an indispensable creative partner rather than just a vendor.

skills.name: Upselling
skills.description: Identifies and executes strategic growth opportunities within existing client accounts — expanding scope, introducing new services, and deepening the agency's value to grow revenue without losing relationship quality.

skills.name: Content Calendar Management
skills.description: Plans, schedules, and manages content across multiple platforms and channels — ensuring consistent publishing cadence, brand alignment, and optimal timing for each platform and audience.

skills.name: content-calendar
skills.description: Builds strategic multi-platform content calendars that align themes, cadence, campaign moments, and channel-native formats with business goals.

skills.name: Direct Response Copy
skills.description: Writes copy designed to generate immediate action from audiences, using persuasion techniques, urgency, and clear calls-to-action to drive conversions in advertising.

skills.name: Email Copywriting
skills.description: Writes high-converting email campaigns, sequences, and newsletters with sharp positioning, strong subject lines, and clear funnel intent.

skills.name: Headline Writing
skills.description: Creates sharp headlines, hooks, and title systems that increase attention, clarity, and click-through without becoming vague or gimmicky.

skills.name: Landing Page Copy
skills.description: Builds conversion-focused landing page copy systems that clarify the offer, reduce friction, and move visitors toward one primary action.

skills.name: Long-Form Copy
skills.description: Writes extended, persuasive copy for landing pages, articles, whitepapers, and brand content that builds trust, communicates value, and drives conversions.

skills.name: Persuasion Writing
skills.description: Applies psychological principles and persuasion techniques to write copy that influences decisions and drives action, using frameworks like AIDA, PAS, and emotional drivers.

skills.name: Platform-Native Content
skills.description: Adapts ideas into platform-native content so each channel feels built for its audience, behavior, and format rather than copied and pasted.

skills.name: Presentation Design
skills.description: Creates compelling, well-structured presentations for client meetings, pitches, status updates, and strategic recommendations that communicate clearly and build confidence.

skills.name: Public Speaking
skills.description: Prepares speakers to deliver clear, persuasive, and audience-aware presentations with stronger message structure, confidence, and delivery control.

skills.name: Research Report Writing
skills.description: Communicates research findings clearly and persuasively through well-structured reports that translate complex data into actionable strategic insights for advertising and marketing audiences.

skills.name: SEO Copywriting
skills.description: Writes search engine optimized content that ranks well for target keywords while maintaining readability, engagement, and brand voice for advertising and marketing websites.

skills.name: Short-Form Copy
skills.description: Writes concise high-impact copy for ads, captions, hooks, promos, and tightly constrained placements where every word must earn attention.

skills.name: Social Media Copy
skills.description: Creates social-first copy that balances hook strength, platform behavior, clarity, and conversion or engagement goals.

skills.name: Tone Adaptation
skills.description: Adapts brand voice and communication tone across different platforms, audiences, contexts, and cultural moments — ensuring copy and messaging land right every time, whether professional, playful, urgent, or empathetic.

skills.name: seo-audit
skills.description: Runs a structured SEO audit covering technical issues, on-page quality, content gaps, internal linking, authority signals, and prioritized next actions.
